title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, allowing easy integration of local LLMs into Python apps.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, enabling browser and Node.js LLM workflows.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama, adding LLM, embedder, and callback components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama, featuring model management and multi-user support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API, supporting completions and embeddings.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with conversation history and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension powered by Ollama models for local code completion.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration for Ollama, providing generator and embedder nodes for RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming, embeddings, and Visual Studio debugging helpers.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings local LLM chat to any server via Ollama.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes clusters with GPU support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that wraps Ollama for CI/CD pipelines, enabling model testing in GitHub Actions.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate for Ollama with Tokio async runtime and serde-powered model definitions.

title: ollama-ui
summary: Minimal React-based chat UI for Ollama, packaged as a single static HTML file.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds Ollama-powered AI commands for note summarization and Q&A.

title: ollama-n8n
summary: n8n community node for Ollama, enabling no-code LLM workflows and automations.

title: ollama-gpt4all
summary: Ollama-compatible port of GPT4All models for consistent local deployment.

title: ollama-huggingface
summary: Utility to convert Hugging Face models into Ollama Modelfiles with one command.
